queries.question: Provide a list of all breaking news articles and also provide a list of news analysis articles about the Turkey-Syria earthquakes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Articles
WHERE Articles.NewsType = "Breaking News" OR Articles.NewsType = "News Analysis" AND Articles.Event = "Turkey–Syria earthquakes"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:NewsType ?newstype_w .
  ?articles p:NewsType ?newstype_w2 .
  ?articles p:Event ?event_w .
  FILTER((STR(?newstype_w) = "Breaking News" || (STR(?newstype_w2) = "News Analysis" && STR(?event_w) = "Turkey–Syria earthquakes")))
}

queries.question: Provide breaking news and news analysis articles about the Turkey-Syria earthquakes.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Articles
WHERE (Articles.NewsType = "Breaking News" OR Articles.NewsType = "News Analysis") AND Articles.Event = "Turkey–Syria earthquakes"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?articles p:Title ?title .
  ?articles p:NewsType ?newstype_w .
  ?articles p:NewsType ?newstype_w2 .
  ?articles p:Event ?event_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?newstype_w) = "Breaking News" || STR(?newstype_w2) = "News Analysis")) && STR(?event_w) = "Turkey–Syria earthquakes"))
}
